command: localperf bench http-load --backend openai-chat --base-url https://ugmgglehlpy403um.us-east-2.aws.endpoints.huggingface.cloud --model /repository --dataset-name random --num-prompts 128 --max-concurrency 64 --request-rate inf --result-filename runs/qwen36-35b-nvfp4-hf-endpoint-256k-decode-extension/c32-run/results/hf-qwen36-256k-c32__decode-256k__c64.json --timeout 21600s --min-mem-available-gib 1 --random-input-len 259072 --random-output-len 1024 --endpoint /v1/chat/completions --extra-body '{"chat_template_kwargs":{"enable_thinking":false}}' --ignore-eos --temperature 0
